question: Q4
title: Intent classifier is by-design; weightsApplied telemetry is misleading
summary: understand is the safe low-evidence fallback (by-design) and retrieval-class profile weights are dark-launched off (SPECKIT_RETRIEVAL_PROFILE_WEIGHTS). The real defect: weightsApplied:off reports Stage-2 intent weighting (always off for hybrid), not the retrieval-class profile weighting a reader assumes. Fix: telemetry honesty (small) or short-query route differentiation (larger).
